categories.title: 🎬 Movies & Series
categories.description: Free web platforms to stream movies, TV shows, and dramas online.

entries.name: Prmovies
entries.description: Free movie and series streaming with a large catalog; no registration required.

entries.name: Cinemaos
entries.description: All-in-one platform covering movies, series, and anime in one place.

entries.name: M4UHD
entries.description: HD-quality movie streaming with multiple server options.

entries.name: MultiMovies
entries.description: Extensive library of movies and series available for free.

entries.name: SpenFlix
entries.description: Netflix-inspired interface offering curated free streaming content.

entries.name: Sflix
entries.description: Ad-free streaming of movies and TV shows with fast servers.

entries.name: IShowMovies
entries.description: Large movie and series library with quick-loading servers.

entries.name: Lookmovie2
entries.description: Wide selection of movies and series with subtitle support and multiple languages.

entries.name: WeFlix
entries.description: Modern streaming interface with multiple mirror links.

entries.name: Dramanice
entries.description: Dedicated platform for Korean dramas and Asian series with subtitles.

entries.name: Kisskh
entries.description: Asian drama-focused streaming with a clean, organized layout.

entries.name: Hydraflix
entries.description: Free streaming platform with multiple quality options.

entries.name: moviedb
entries.description: Movie database site with integrated streaming links.

entries.name: Levidia
entries.description: Sleek modern design with fast loading speeds and wide content selection.

entries.name: Watchtv
entries.description: Netflix-like UI offering the latest movies and series for free.

entries.name: Tvids
entries.description: Streaming platform with an easy-to-browse, user-friendly interface.

entries.name: Sereal
entries.description: Curated streaming service with neatly organized content categories.

entries.name: DramaFull
entries.description: Full-episode streaming of Korean and Asian dramas.

entries.name: GoPlay
entries.description: Free movie and series streaming with multi-server support.

entries.name: Cinevez
entries.description: Modern streaming service with well-organized genre categories.

categories.title: 📺 Live TV
categories.description: Stream live television channels from around the world for free.

entries.name: Global Free TV
entries.description: 7000+ free live TV channels from 150+ countries; no sign-up needed.

entries.name: Jiotv+
entries.description: Aggregates Indian streaming platforms including Zee5, JioTV, and YuppTV.

categories.title: 📖 Light Novel
categories.description: Read and translate light novels, web novels, and Chinese fiction online.

entries.name: WTR-Lab
entries.description: Modern light novel reader with dark mode and a broad catalog.

entries.name: MTLBooks
entries.description: LN reader with up-to-date chapter releases and a large library.

entries.name: Fictionzone
entries.description: Large collection of light novels with fast translation updates.

entries.name: LNMTL
entries.description: Chapter-by-chapter machine translations of popular light novels.

entries.name: FANMTL
entries.description: Fan-sourced novel translations with community ratings and comments.

entries.name: Wuxia
entries.description: Focused library of Chinese wuxia and martial arts fiction.

entries.name: NovelBuddy
entries.description: Web novel reader with bookmarks, reading history, and recommendations.

entries.name: RoyalRoad
entries.description: Community platform for original web fiction and independently published light novels.

entries.name: Ranobes
entries.description: Extensive catalog of novels with fan-translated and machine-translated chapters.

categories.title: 🖼️ Manga
categories.description: Read manga, manhwa, manhua, and Western comics online.

entries.name: Mangakakalot
entries.description: Fast manga reader with up-to-date chapter releases and a large library.

entries.name: MangaDex
entries.description: Community-driven scanlation platform supporting 40+ languages.

entries.name: MangaFire
entries.description: High-quality scans with fast, reliable servers.

entries.name: MangaPark
entries.description: Large library featuring chapters from multiple scanlation groups.

entries.name: Bato
entries.description: Scanlation community platform for manga, manhwa, and manhua.

entries.name: MangaPill
entries.description: Clean, ad-light reader with an extensive manga archive.

entries.name: MangaReader
entries.description: High-quality manga with multiple server options and tracking features.

entries.name: ReadComic
entries.description: Large library of Western comics alongside manga titles.

categories.title: 📺 Anime
categories.description: Stream subbed and dubbed anime series and movies online.

entries.name: AnimeKai
entries.description: Premium-quality anime streaming with AniList integration and rich episode info.

entries.name: Kuudere
entries.description: One of the largest anime libraries online.

entries.name: Animetsu
entries.description: High-quality anime streaming with MyAnimeList sync and auto-next episodes.

entries.name: AniSnatch
entries.description: Low-ad anime streaming offering both dubbed and subbed content.

entries.name: KickAssAnime
entries.description: Anime streaming with video progress tracking and a seasonal schedule.

entries.name: Animepahe
entries.description: Compressed high-quality video ideal for users with limited bandwidth.

categories.title: 🔞 NSFW
categories.description: Adult content platforms. Must be 18+ to access.

entries.name: Manytoon
entries.description: Adult webtoon and manga reader with frequent updates.

entries.name: nhentai
entries.description: Large archive of doujinshi and adult manga with tagging support.

entries.name: Literotica
entries.description: Community platform for erotic fiction and stories across many genres.

entries.name: Toonily
entries.description: Adult manhwa platform with high-quality scans and regular updates.

entries.name: Hanime
entries.description: Adult anime streaming with HD quality and organized categories.

entries.name: Haho
entries.description: Adult manga and manhwa platform with a clean reading layout.

categories.title: 📱 Applications
categories.description: Open-source Android apps for streaming anime, reading manga, novels, and more.

entries.name: CloudStream 3
entries.description: Plugin-based app for streaming movies, series, anime, and live TV.

entries.name: SkyStream
entries.description: A new, cross-platform media streaming application inspired by CloudStream.

entries.name: Flixclusive
entries.description: Material Design movie and series app with a provider plugin system.

entries.name: Mihon
entries.description: Open-source manga reader (Tachiyomi successor) with a vast extension library.

entries.name: Yokai
entries.description: Tachiyomi fork with enhanced UI and additional reading features.

entries.name: LNReader
entries.description: Dedicated light novel reader with offline downloads and chapter management.

entries.name: IReader
entries.description: Extensible e-book and light novel reader with multiple source plugins.

entries.name: Legado
entries.description: Feature-rich Chinese e-book reader with broad source support.

entries.name: QuickNovel
entries.description: Lightweight novel reader app with fast chapter loading.

entries.name: Neko
entries.description: MangaDex-focused manga reader with offline reading and tracking.

entries.name: TachiyomiSY
entries.description: Extended Tachiyomi fork with enhanced source support and tracking options.

entries.name: Myne
entries.description: Open Library e-book downloader and reader with Material Design.

entries.name: Hayai
entries.description: cherry-picks pieces from across the Tachiyomi ecosystem and adds first-class novel support.

categories.title: 🎭 YouTube Clients
categories.description: Privacy-friendly and feature-enhanced alternatives to the official YouTube app.

entries.name: LibreTube
entries.description: Privacy-focused YouTube client using the Piped API; no Google account required.

entries.name: NewPipe
entries.description: Lightweight client with background play, downloads, and no tracking.

entries.name: Morphe
entries.description: Customizable YouTube client with a themeable interface.

entries.name: ReVanced
entries.description: YouTube mod featuring ad-blocking, SponsorBlock, and return of dislike counts.

entries.name: FreeTube
entries.description: Desktop YouTube client that stores subscriptions locally without a Google account.

entries.name: SmartTube
entries.description: Ad-free YouTube client optimized for Android TV and set-top boxes.

entries.name: Materialious
entries.description: Material You-designed web YouTube client powered by the Piped API.

categories.title: 🎧 YouTube Music
categories.description: Open-source music players and YouTube Music clients for Android and desktop.

entries.name: BloomeeTunes
entries.description: Music streaming app supporting YouTube, Spotify, and other sources.

entries.name: namida
entries.description: Feature-rich local and YouTube music player with advanced queue management.

entries.name: Spotube
entries.description: Cross-platform Spotify client using YouTube as a backend; no premium needed.

entries.name: SimpMusic
entries.description: YouTube Music client with lyrics synchronization and offline downloads.

entries.name: AbleMusicPlayer
entries.description: YouTube Music client with Spotify playlist import support.

entries.name: Musify
entries.description: Music streaming app with support for multiple services and offline playback.

entries.name: Muzza
entries.description: Cross-platform music player with YouTube and local library support.
